summary: This source is a collection of video titles from a CNBC YouTube playlist featuring Warren Buffett. While lacking full transcripts, the titles themselves capture several of Buffett's core aphorisms and beliefs regarding investing, cryptocurrencies, and economic systems.

principles.rationale: It does not produce or create any underlying value.
principles.source_quote: Bitcoin Is An Asset That Creates Nothing

principles.statement: Market declines should be welcomed by investors.
principles.rationale: Falling stock prices present buying opportunities rather than reasons to panic.
principles.source_quote: When Stocks Go Down, It's Good News

principles.statement: Buying and holding index funds is a proven strategy.
principles.rationale: It is a simple, long-term approach that has historically been successful for investors.
principles.source_quote: Buying And Holding Index Funds Has Worked

mental_models.name: Healthcare as a Tapeworm
mental_models.description: Conceptualizing the rising costs of the healthcare system not just as an expense, but as a parasite that drains resources and vitality from the broader economic system.

heuristics: Don't mix politics with your investments decision.
When stocks go down, it's good news.

signature_quotes.text: Health Care Is A Tapeworm On The Economic System
signature_quotes.context: Describing the economic burden of healthcare costs.

signature_quotes.text: It's Insane To Risk What You Have For Something You Don't Need
signature_quotes.context: Warning against unnecessary financial risk and greed.

signature_quotes.text: Just Looking At The Price Is Not Investing
signature_quotes.context: Differentiating true investing from mere price speculation.

signature_quotes.text: Bitcoin Is An Asset That Creates Nothing

anti_patterns.description: Risking what you already have and need in pursuit of something you do not need.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It is an 'insane' risk-reward proposition driven by greed rather than logic.

anti_patterns.description: Equating investing with merely looking at a stock's price.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: True investing requires understanding the underlying business, whereas just looking at the price is speculation.
